messages.content: Extract tasks from meeting notes and return JSON with key tasks.
Meeting notes: Sarah will draft the marketing plan by Tuesday.
{"tasks": [{"task": "Draft marketing plan", "owner": "Sarah", "due_date": "Tuesday"}]}
